meta.title: Life As A Military Spouse | What It's Actually Like To Be Married To Someone In The Military
meta.description:
Military relationships, like all relationships, take work — but it’s worth it. Here's a glimpse of what is really like as a military spouse. 

0:00 Introduction
0:45 Emotional Highs and Lows
1:42 Long Distance Friendships
2:48 Homecoming Realities
3:44 PCSing Overseas
5:46 Reinventing Yourself
